title: Can we please export and import on the Location column?
excerpt: Hi, I really need to be able to export and import on the Location column.  Can you please consider this?

posts.author: naomieddy (Naomi Eddy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I really need to be able to export and import on the Location column. Can you please consider this?

posts.author: MichelleR (Michelle Rumney)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, us too!! - why?? The Location/Map feature is a USP of Monday.com, yet we can’t easily get large amounts of data in or out of it - the only way atm is to manually cut and paste geo data line by line for each item on a board. We have over 2500 items - that’s a lot of wasted time.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Naomi, Michelle,

We totally understand your needs and frustrations. This is why we’ve build a couple of apps for the monday marketplace around the Location column. One of which, Location Importer, is completely focussed on your specific question.

Have a look, install it and enjoy the free trial for 14 days and don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions!

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: LeslieP (Leslie P)
posts.cookedHtml: I should be able to indicate which other columns are address, city, state, and zip and the Monday system inherently combine those fields into the location column (which would automatically update when a contact address changes), and then apply mapping.
